articles.title: Jaylen Brown, Jayson Tatum dynamic shines in Celtics win over Cavaliers: 7 takeaways
articles.description:
Tatum is clearly a little further along in his recovery than anyone expected, which is bad news for the Eastern Conference.

The post Jaylen Brown, Jayson Tatum dynamic shines in Celtics win over Cavaliers: 7 takeaways appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics defeated Cavaliers, showcasing strong performance from Jaylen Brown and Jayson Tatum.
Tatum's recovery is ahead of schedule, posing challenges for Eastern Conference rivals.
Boston residents can expect heightened team competitiveness as playoffs approach.

articles.title: Former Patriots WR cautions against signing Alec Pierce to a hefty contract
articles.description:

summary: Former Patriots WR advises against a $30 million contract for Alec Pierce.

Signing Pierce could impact the Patriots' salary cap and roster decisions.

articles.title: North Kingstown, R.I. police officer dies by suicide, department says
articles.description:

summary: North Kingstown police officer died by suicide, highlighting mental health issues among first responders.

Local communities in Boston are reminded of the importance of mental health support for first responders.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown has 23 points, Jayson Tatum 20 as Celtics top Cavs 109-98
articles.description:
Payton Pritchard added 18 points and Baylor Scheierman had 16 points and 10 rebounds as Boston moved within three games of East-leading Detroit.

The post Jaylen Brown has 23 points, Jayson Tatum 20 as Celtics top Cavs 109-98 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown scored 23 points; Jayson Tatum added 20.
Boston is now three games behind East-leading Detroit.
